=== Properties ===
Minimal Height Limit: 7   

Minimal Height: 22   

Maximum Height: 40   

Maximum Height Limit: 60   

Minimal Radius: 256   

Maximum Radius: 320   

Roughness: 10   

Hills: 10   

Chance: 0.01   

Music: Leaves   

Valid Player Spawn: True   
=== Structures ===
====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.3   

Log: Air   

Top: Oak Top   

Height: 6   

Height Variation: 3   

ID: Simple Tree   

branched: False   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.2   

leafElongation: 1.0   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadiusVariation: 2   

leaves: Oak Leaves   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.004   

Log: Oak Log   

Top: Oak Top   

Height: 6   

Height Variation: 3   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.2   

leafElongation: 1.0   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadiusVariation: 2   

leaves: Oak Leaves   

type: Round   

====Simple Vegetation====
Chance: 0.01   

Block: Oak Log   

Height: 1   

Height Variation: 2   

ID: Simple Vegetation   

====Simple Vegetation====
Chance: 0.0015   

Block: Cobblestone   

Height: 2   

Height Variation: 15   

ID: Simple Vegetation   

====Simple Vegetation====
Chance: 0.0015   

Block: Slate   

Height: 2   

Height Variation: 15   

ID: Simple Vegetation   

====Simple Vegetation====
Chance: 0.0015   

Block: Soil   

Height: 2   

Height Variation: 15   

ID: Simple Vegetation   

====Simple Vegetation====
Chance: 0.05   

Block: Workbench   

Height: 1   

Height Variation: 0   

ID: Simple Vegetation   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.004   

Block: Workbench   

Width: 8   

Variation: 3   

Density: 0.1   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Flower Patch   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Torch:1   

Width: 12   

Variation: 3   

Density: 0.1   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Flower Patch   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.002   

Block: Torch:1   

Width: 8   

Variation: 3   

Density: 0.1   

Priority: 0.5   

ID: Flower Patch   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.001   

Block: Slate   

Width: 10   

Variation: 3   

Density: 0.1   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Flower Patch   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.003   

Block: Cobblestone   

Width: 10   

Variation: 3   

Density: 0.2   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Flower Patch   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.003   

Block: Soil   

Width: 10   

Variation: 3   

Density: 0.2   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Flower Patch
